elements.name: Verify a client cannot be added without filling all mandatory fields

steps.name: the user is logged into the LMS SmartCliff website
the user clicks on the Dynamic Field Settings icon
the user navigated to the Client Modal
the user opens the Add New Client dialog
the user leaves one or more mandatory fields empty
clicks the "Add Client" button
the client should not be added
appropriate validation messages should be displayed

elements.name: Verify clicking the Cancel button closes the Add New Client dialog

steps.name: the user is logged into the LMS SmartCliff website
the user clicks on the Dynamic Field Settings icon
the user navigated to the Client Modal
the user opens the Add New Client dialog
the user enters client details
clicks the "Cancel" button
the Add New Client dialog should be closed
the client should not be added

elements.name: Verify a client cannot be added with an existing email address

the user clicks on the Dynamic Field Settings icon
the user navigated to the Client Modal
the user opens the Add New Client dialog
the user enters client details with an existing email address

the client should not be added
